report.summary: Community v3 cycle: Drafted 5 tweets (#183-187) themed around SEC ETF mega-ruling day (91 apps, 24 tokens), 48-day extreme fear streak, DCA-in-fear narrative, upcoming Initia/Kite AI guides, and 556-page milestone. Created Discord/TG SEC ruling day alert and Newsletter v30 section with market snapshot + tool links. Designed 2 SVG social cards (SEC ETF Ruling Day infographic + Fear & Greed 48-day streak with historical comparisons).

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #183: SEC ETF Mega-Ruling Day — 91 applications, 24 tokens, 16 pre-classified as commodities. BTC volatile $66.2K-$68.8K. XRP ETFs drew $1.44B pre-decision. Links to ETF complete guide. Scheduled: Fri Mar 28, 10AM ET.

Tweet #184: Fear & Greed 48-Day Extreme Fear Streak — longest since FTX collapse. F&G at 10. $14.16B options expired. ETF outflows -$340M. Links to fear-greed-timeline tool. Scheduled: Fri Mar 28, 2PM ET.
Tweet #185: DCA in Extreme Fear — Historical data showing Jun 2022 (F&G 6) led to +432%, Nov 2022 (F&G 20) led to +349%. Links to DCA calculator. Scheduled: Sat Mar 29, 10AM ET.
Tweet #186: Coming Soon — Initia (interwoven L1) and Kite AI (AI payment blockchain) guides in the queue. 556 pages live. Scheduled: Sat Mar 29, 4PM ET.
Tweet #187: 556 Pages All Free — Platform overview: 92 tools, 265+ guides, 19 exchange reviews, 15 wallet comparisons, live market data. No ads, no paywalls. Scheduled: Sun Mar 30, 12PM ET.
Discord/TG: SEC ETF Mega-Ruling Day Alert — full context with 16 commodity classifications, XRP inflows, options expiry, market data. Links to ETF guide.

Newsletter v30 Section: SEC ETF Ruling Day Special — market snapshot (BTC $66,587, ETH $1,989, F&G 10), top tools for this market (DCA calc, F&G timeline, options calc, risk analyzer), plus links to 4 new guides from v2 cycle.

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: SVG social card: SEC ETF Ruling Day (1200x630) — Dark glass-morphism design with BREAKING badge, '91 Applications | 24 Tokens | 1 Deadline' headline. 12 token chips (BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, LTC, DOGE, ADA, LINK, AVAX, DOT, HBAR, SHIB). 4 stat cards: BTC $66,587 (-4.1%), F&G 10 (48-day streak), XRP ETF $1.44B pre-inflows, $14.16B options expired. CTA linking ETF guide. Saved to reports/community-drafts/2026-03-27-social-card-sec-etf-ruling-day.svg

SVG social card: Fear & Greed 48-Day Streak (1200x630) — Extreme Fear theme with oversized '48' counter, current index score 10/100. Historical comparison cards: Jun 2022 (+432% in 18mo), Nov 2022 (+349% in 14mo), Mar 2026 (???). Fear gauge bar at 10%. CTA linking fear-greed-timeline tool.
